meaning: adj.&adv.{美橄}在前场(的) 向前场(的)
examples: Maybe the Browns would even throw downfield a couple times a game.
When Troy Polamalu intercepts a pass and dashes downfield, my spirits soar.
He's determined to get downfield, but at any given moment he may need to go sideways or even backwards to get there.
Desperate, he heaved the ball downfield, right into the arms of a Cowboy defender.
Edinburgh lock Craig Hamilton pounced and his hack downfield ended with Ben Cairns going over the try-line.
